svg.title: Three UI surfaces — user chat, admin panel, and built-in DB viewers
svg.desc: Shows Chainlit on port 8000 for users, Streamlit on port 8501 for admin, and Qdrant dashboard plus LangSmith as free built-in viewers, all sharing the same config volume.

g.text: app detects YAML change, reloads config — no restart needed
SQLite (local file) — Streamlit reads and displays
